response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the reference lyrics for 'Airman ga Taosenai' and 'Melodies of Life'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for both vocal segments; instrumental theme titles were manually subtitled for context as per Visual Event rules. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied precise timing to vocal bursts and included title cards during the transition to the next performance segments.

subtitles.original: あの竜巻 何回やっても避けれない
subtitles.english: That tornado, no matter how many times I try, I can't avoid it.

subtitles.original: 後ろに回って 撃ち続けても いずれは風に飛ばされる
subtitles.english: Even if I go around to the back and keep shooting, eventually I'll be blown away.

subtitles.original: タイム連打も ためしてみたけど 竜巻相手じゃ 意味がない！
subtitles.english: I tried button mashing, but it's useless against the tornado!

subtitles.original: だから次は絶対勝つために 僕はE缶だけは最後までとっておく
subtitles.english: So, to win for sure next time, I'll save my E-Tank until the very end.

subtitles.original: あてもなく さまよっていた
手がかりもなく 探しつづけた
subtitles.english: I kept searching, though I had no clues.

subtitles.original: あなたがくれた 思い出を
心をいやす 歌にして
subtitles.english: ...into a song to heal my heart.
